_meta.author: shadcnspace
_meta.title: Error Tooltip
_meta.description: Shadcn Tooltip is an easy, simple way to hint users to provide extra context, guidance, or pop-up for users in your React and Next.js applications. They help increase the usability of a website but it doesn’t mean that they need to be displayed always on your interface, especially not in forms, inputs or any other kind of interactive element for navigation. Developed with React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, these tooltips are lightweight, highly customizable and extremely accessible out of the box.
